subcodes.first_line: O Beauty! Upon Thee be the glory of God, the Self-Sufficient, the Most Exalted! Time and again hast Thou been mentioned and verses have been sent down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جمال علیک بهاء الله الغنی المتعال مکرر ذکرت مذکور و آیات نازل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
